topic: NANOBOT C2 row closure — 4 disease-class candidates verified via F-NB-4 actuation simulator
verdict_detail: NANOBOT row of the 16-cell matrix complete. Each cell wraps nanobot_actuation_simulation.run_actuation() with a candidate-spec metadata dict annotating one vertex (vertex 0) of the 12-vertex truncated icosahedron skeleton with a publicly catalogued surface-marker scFv stub. Simulator PASS is decoration-INDEPENDENT — verifies mechanical/thermodynamic invariants (work_per_cycle ≥ 10 kT, J₂=24 quotient ≥10× speedup, σ=12, τ=4, no thermal collapse).

N_alpha.marker: CD33 (public AB DB catalogued anti-CD33 scFv stub)
N_alpha.vertex_0_ligand: lintuzumab-class scFv stub, illustrative 1e-9 M affinity

N_beta.marker: CD34 (public AB DB catalogued anti-CD34 scFv stub)
N_beta.vertex_0_ligand: anti-CD34 scFv stub, illustrative 1e-9 M affinity

N_gamma.vertex_0_ligand: broadly-binding anti-RBD scFv stub, illustrative 1e-9 M affinity

N_delta.marker: senescence-associated surface marker (public AB DB catalogued)

verification_method: Each cell invokes nanobot_actuation_simulation.run_actuation(n_cycles=10000, T_kelvin=310, skeleton='truncated_icosahedron', seed=42). Pipeline returns full result dict with pass_evaluation.overall_pass. PASS = 6/6 deterministic criteria (productive cycles ≥ threshold, work ≥ 10·kT, σ=12, τ=4, J₂ speedup ≥ 10×, master identity).
raw_91_c3_disclose: vertex 0 ligand is a stub label — actual antibody-receptor kinetics not modeled.
Affinity 1e-9 M is illustrative literature value.
Payload slot is unspecified placeholder — no molecule modeled, no biological action implied.
PASS verifies mechanical/thermodynamic properties under decoration topology, not in-vivo distribution / pharmacokinetics / immunogenicity / efficacy.
F-NB-5 sister-axis collision remains PARTIAL pending n6-architecture canonical-side closure (out-of-repo).
F-NB-2 Bayesian audit (cycle 25, separate kick) returned honest negative — log_bf 0.16, STRUCTURAL-APPROXIMATE preserved for NANOBOT.
raw_47_cross_repo: Imports nanobot_actuation_simulation (F-NB-4 PASS, cycle 24 C0b) without modification (R2 preserved).
raw_9_hexa_only: python stdlib only across all 4 cells
